questions.question: What happened to Ananias and Sapphira after they lied about the price of their land?
Who advised the Sanhedrin to leave the apostles alone, saying if their work was from God it could not be stopped?
An angel opened the prison doors at night and told the apostles to go stand in the temple and speak.
We must obey _____ rather than men.
They departed from the presence of the council, _____ that they were counted worthy to suffer dishonor for the Name.
